name: Global Monday
why: J1 PLACEMENT AGENCY — they find the host company AND handle sponsorship. Seattle placements confirmed. Paid positions, fast placement (<4 weeks).
why_vi: AGENCY TUYỂN DỤNG J1 — họ tìm công ty host VÀ xử lý bảo lãnh. Đã xác nhận có vị trí tại Seattle. Vị trí có lương, đặt chỗ nhanh (<4 tuần).
pitch: Submit profile → they find host + arrange J1 simultaneously. Remove burden from Thomas finding host company.
pitch_vi: Nộp hồ sơ → họ tìm host + sắp xếp J1 cùng lúc. Loại bỏ gánh nặng tìm công ty host.

ev.quote: "Global Monday works with companies providing paid J-1 Internship and Training positions across the United States in cities such as Seattle… business placements including marketing, finance, business development." Placement in under 4 weeks. 25 years experience, 50+ countries.

name: Intrax/CICD Seattle
why: LOCAL Seattle-HQ J1 sponsor (est. 1997, part of Intrax since 2022). Can do site visits locally, help find Seattle host companies directly.
why_vi: Nhà tài trợ J1 TRỤ SỞ tại Seattle (est. 1997). Có thể thăm địa điểm tại chỗ, hỗ trợ tìm công ty host ở Seattle trực tiếp.
pitch: Local presence = cheap site visit ($250 flat). Best option if Thomas creates LLC as host company — they know Seattle employers.
pitch_vi: Hiện diện địa phương = thăm địa điểm rẻ ($250 cố định). Lựa chọn tốt nhất nếu Thomas lập LLC làm host.

ev.quote: "CICD (Center for International Career Development) is headquartered in Seattle, WA and operates as a U.S. Department of State-designated J-1 Visa sponsor… Since 1997, CICD has provided thousands of participants with affordable J-1 visa programs."

name: Bridge Aspire
why: All-inclusive J1 placement agency: DS-7002, DS-2019, medical insurance, host company search, 24/7 support all included. Interns earn $2,000–$4,500/month.
why_vi: Agency J1 trọn gói: DS-7002, DS-2019, bảo hiểm y tế, tìm công ty host, hỗ trợ 24/7 đều bao gồm. Thực tập sinh kiếm $2,000–$4,500/tháng.
pitch: Pay $3,500–$5,000 program fee → they handle everything. Most interns recoup cost within 3–4 months.
pitch_vi: Trả phí $3,500–$5,000 → họ lo mọi thứ. Hầu hết thực tập sinh thu hồi chi phí trong 3–4 tháng.

ev.quote: "Bridge Aspire participants earn between $2,000 and $4,500 per month… all-inclusive services: eligibility verification, resume formatting, interview coordination with verified host companies, DS-7002 training plan, DS-2019 visa documentation, medical insurance, 24/7 support."

name: Internships USA (EU)
why: Confirmed Seattle marketing internship placements. Handles both J1 sponsorship and host company matching.
why_vi: Đã xác nhận có vị trí marketing tại Seattle. Xử lý cả bảo lãnh J1 và tìm công ty host.
pitch: Submit profile → matched to Seattle marketing role + J1 arranged in one package.
pitch_vi: Nộp hồ sơ → ghép cặp với vị trí marketing tại Seattle + J1 được sắp xếp trong một gói.

ev.quote: Dedicated Seattle internship page lists marketing positions. "Paid internships and traineeships in Seattle, WA" — confirmed marketing track available.

name: Remitly
why: Immigrant community mission = perfect match for Vietnamese candidate. Blog content shows J1 familiarity. Strong marketing team, Seattle HQ.
why_vi: Sứ mệnh cộng đồng nhập cư = phù hợp hoàn hảo. Blog cho thấy quen thuộc với J1. Trụ sở Seattle.
pitch: Vietnamese-American story, Southeast Asian market expertise, immigrant mission alignment.
pitch_vi: Câu chuyện Việt-Mỹ, chuyên môn thị trường Đông Nam Á, phù hợp sứ mệnh nhập cư.

ev.what: No explicit J1 policy — contact HR
ev.quote: Remitly publishes J1 visa educational guides ("The Definitive Guide to the J-1 Visa") showing familiarity. Careers page has no explicit J1 policy statement. Self-arranged J1 is worth asking about directly.

name: TikTok Seattle
why: Asia-Pacific marketing, identity match, heavy international hiring. Sponsors H-1B for FT roles — J1 intern (self-arranged, no employer cost) worth asking.
why_vi: Marketing châu Á-TBD, phù hợp bản sắc, tuyển dụng quốc tế mạnh. H-1B cho full-time — J1 self-arranged đáng hỏi.
pitch: Native TikTok creator, Vietnamese market fluency, 8K organic following, TikTok/Meta analytics experience.
pitch_vi: Creator TikTok bản xứ, thành thạo thị trường Việt Nam, 8K lượt theo dõi organic.

ev.what: No J1 intern policy — HR ask needed
ev.quote: "Expect candidates to have proper work authorization within the country they are applying." H-1B confirmed for FT roles (979 LCAs FY2025). No explicit J1 intern acceptance. Self-arranged J1 (employer just signs DS-7002, no visa costs) should be raised directly with recruiter.

name: Copacino+Fujikado
why: Top Seattle indie agency, year-round 3-month rotating intern program. No explicit J1 restriction found.
why_vi: Agency indie hàng đầu Seattle, chương trình thực tập luân phiên 3 tháng. Không tìm thấy hạn chế J1 rõ ràng.
pitch: Award-winning international student (AIGC Gold Singapore 2024), editorial portfolio, bilingual copywriting.
pitch_vi: Sinh viên quốc tế đoạt giải (AIGC Gold Singapore 2024), portfolio biên tập, copywriting song ngữ.

ev.what: Intern program confirmed — J1 policy unknown
ev.quote: Internship page confirms year-round 3-month rotations, one reserved for first-gen college students. No J1/visa language found. Small enough to be flexible if approached correctly — self-arranged J1 means zero paperwork for them.

name: McKinstry
why: B.L.U.E. intern program confirmed active. No explicit J1 restriction. Mid-size company = flexibility.
why_vi: Chương trình B.L.U.E. intern đang hoạt động. Không có hạn chế J1 rõ ràng. Công ty vừa = linh hoạt hơn.
pitch: Marketing intern with data analytics and campaign execution background.
pitch_vi: Thực tập marketing với nền tảng phân tích dữ liệu và thực thi chiến dịch.

ev.what: Intern program confirmed — J1 policy unknown
ev.quote: B.L.U.E. program page confirmed at mckinstry.com/join-us/blue-internship-program/ — no visa/J1 mention. Only 1 H-1B LCA filed 2022–2024 suggesting limited prior sponsorship — but self-arranged J1 costs them nothing beyond signing DS-7002.

name: Holland America Line
why: Active internship program (Social Media, HR, Maritime ops). APAC/Vietnam-route relevance. No J1 restriction found.
why_vi: Chương trình thực tập đang hoạt động (Social Media, HR). Tuyến APAC/Việt Nam liên quan. Không tìm thấy hạn chế J1.
pitch: Vietnamese native, Southeast Asian consumer behavior expertise, multilingual marketing for APAC routes.
pitch_vi: Người Việt Nam bản địa, chuyên gia hành vi người tiêu dùng ĐNA, marketing đa ngôn ngữ cho tuyến APAC.

ev.what: Intern program confirmed — J1 policy unknown
ev.quote: UW Career Center posted Holland America 2026 Summer Social Media internship (Nov 2025). HAL careers site active. No J1/visa language on internship pages. APAC routes make Vietnamese candidate especially relevant.

name: Salesforce / Tableau
why: CONFIRMED live Summer 2026 Global Paid Media marketing intern posting. Large org = structured J1 process worth asking.
why_vi: Đã xác nhận có vị trí thực tập marketing Hè 2026 đang mở. Tổ chức lớn = quy trình J1 có cấu trúc.
pitch: Data analytics fluency, marketing automation, campaign measurement background.

ev.what: Live 2026 role confirmed — J1 policy unknown
ev.quote: Confirmed: "Summer 2026 Intern — Global Field Marketing, Paid Media" posted at careers.salesforce.com (job ID jr329802). No explicit J1 policy stated. Large company with international offices = higher likelihood of J1 flexibility.

name: Expedia Group
why: International intern program across global locations. No explicit J1 policy found — Glassdoor notes visa sponsorship comes up in interviews.
pitch: Travel-oriented Vietnamese marketing student with digital content and social media analytics skills.

ev.quote: Glassdoor review (interview): "They should ask basic questions like — will the candidate need visa sponsorship before scheduling an interview." Suggests it is a live consideration but no confirmed J1 acceptance.

name: SAP Seattle
why: German multinational = international-friendly culture. Active marketing intern hirer. J1 common in German multinationals.
pitch: Data-driven marketing with analytics background relevant to SAP ecosystem.

ev.quote: No direct J1 evidence found. SAP is a German multinational with established international hiring practices globally. Self-arranged J1 worth raising — they bear no sponsorship costs.

name: VML / Wunderman Thompson
why: WPP global agency with structured intern programs. International candidates common in global holding companies.
pitch: Full-funnel campaign experience across SMS/MMS/email/push, print design portfolio.

ev.quote: No direct J1 evidence found. WPP/Publicis agencies are global holding companies with international staffing — J1 interns are common in agency networks. Verify directly with Seattle office.

name: T-Mobile
why: EXPLICITLY stated no visa sponsorship for interns. Do not contact for J1.
pitch: Would be ideal due to $26–47/hr intern pay and mobile marketing org, but blanket no-visa policy blocks J1 hosting.

ev.what: EXPLICIT NO — direct quote from careers page
ev.quote: "The employer does not sponsor work visas for internship positions, which also applies to individuals with F-1 student status who desire sponsorship after they complete their education." — T-Mobile careers page, all internship job postings.

name: Nordstrom
why: EXPLICITLY stated no visa sponsorship for interns. Strong internship program but visa-blocked.
pitch: Perfect fit for Nga (fashion background, 8K following) but no-visa policy is unambiguous.

ev.what: EXPLICIT NO — direct quote from careers FAQ
ev.quote: "At this time, we are unable to sponsor visas or work authorizations for internship roles." — Nordstrom Careers FAQ. Accepts F-1 CPT/OPT only.

name: Starbucks
why: Seattle iconic brand, 10-week internship program. No visa policy found explicitly.
pitch: Vietnam is a major Starbucks market — native Vietnamese insight on APAC consumer behavior.

ev.what: Intern program confirmed — J1 policy unknown
ev.quote: "College students considered in their junior year (or third year for international students)" — clarifies eligibility, not sponsorship. No J1/visa language on internship pages. H-1B sponsored for FT roles only.

name: Amazon Marketing
why: 10,000 interns from 45 countries per year. Massive marketing org, international hire history.
pitch: Ecommerce marketing background (ran own vintage store), data-driven campaigns, bilingual.

ev.quote: "Amazon hires approximately 10,000 interns annually from over 45 countries" — Amazon.jobs about page. No explicit J1 intern policy stated. Self-arranged J1 worth raising in application.

name: Zillow
why: Large Seattle tech co, marketing team, structured intern program.
pitch: Data analytics, social media strategy, digital marketing execution.

ev.what: No J1 evidence found — contact HR
ev.quote: No J1-specific evidence found on careers pages or public sources. Zillow has structured intern program but no international/visa policy stated publicly.

name: Holland America — via Agency
contact: globalmonday.org or bridgeaspire.com (request Holland America placement)
why: Request HAL as target host company through placement agency. Agencies have existing relationships with Seattle companies.
pitch: Request specifically by name — agency can approach HAL on Nga's behalf with J1 framework already set.

ev.what: Agency path — circumvents direct HR barrier
ev.quote: Agencies like Global Monday and Bridge Aspire approach host companies on behalf of applicants — removes need for Nga to navigate visa policy directly. HAL internship confirmed open via UW Career Center (Nov 2025).
